creator: crjaensch

evidence.text: A multi-platform app to serve as a prompts catalog, a LLM playground for running and optimizing prompts, plus a prompts evaluation and assessment playground. # PromptoLab PromptoLab is a cross-platform desktop application for cataloging, evaluating, testing, and improving LLM prompts. It provides a playground for interactive prompt development and a test set manager for systematic prompt testing. ### Key Features - **Prompts Catalog**: Seamlessly define and organize prompts using three distinct prompt categories. This centralized hub ensures your prompts are always accessible and well-structured for easy reuse.
